Localization.Description: User password hashes were retrieved using the Hashdump MSF module

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} retrieved user password hashes on host {event_src.host} using payload file {subject.process.fullpath}
User {subject.account.name} retrieved user password hashes on host {event_src.host} using payload file {subject.process.fullpath}
